hero.type: relative container with absolute positioned content
hero.overlay: Use both horizontal and vertical gradients over the image to ensure text readability and seamless blending into the page background.

cards.transition: transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out hover:scale-105 hover:z-10 hover:shadow-xl

header.transition: transparent background at top, solid #141414 background on scroll
header.padding: px-8 md:px-16 py-4 flex justify-between items-center

components.navbar: Fixed header. Needs Search input (expandable), navigation links (Movies, Sports, Music, Hindi, German), and a distinct Toggle for 'German Channels' with a red active state.
components.channel_card: 16:9 ratio poster card. Must contain an image/logo of the channel or fallback. On hover, show play icon overlay, channel name, and category badge. Use subtle scale-up animation.
components.hero_banner: Large featured channel or movie background. Includes the Channel Name in large typography, description, 'Watch Now' button (white with black text, or primary red).
components.video_player_modal: Fullscreen modal containing the HLS.js player. Must have custom controls styled to match the dark cinematic theme (red progress bar, sleek icons).
components.loaders: Skeleton loaders matching the 16:9 card aspect ratio in horizontal rails. A pulsing effect (`animate-pulse`) with `#2F2F2F` background.
components.empty_state: If a category has no working channels, show a subtle message 'No channels available in this category' centered in the rail, with secondary text color.
components.german_toggle: A clear, intuitive switch component in the header or settings menu. It must be styled to match the UI, turning red when active. Default state: ON.

motion.hover_states: Hover states must use smooth transitions (duration 200-300ms). Scale up cards on hover.
motion.page_load: Fade in rails sequentially for a smooth loading experience.
motion.modals: Fade in and scale up slightly (0.95 to 1) for the video player modal.

hero_movies.description: Cinematic dark movie scene for the hero section background.

hero_sports.description: Dark stadium night scene for sports hero background.

hero_music.description: Dark live music concert scene for music hero background.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text over images uses text-shadow or a dark gradient overlay. The red accent must pass WCAG AA for large text against the dark background.
accessibility.focus: Focus states should use a 2px solid white outline with a slight offset to be visible against the dark background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React application with a dark theme mimicking Netflix's UI closely.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for icons (Play, Info, Search, X).
Use Tailwind CSS for styling. Set the background to '#141414' globally.
Implement the Header with a transparent-to-solid scroll effect. The header should contain navigation links, search, and a German channels toggle.
The 'German Channels' toggle must be ON by default.
Implement the Hero section taking up 70vh, with a large background image, a gradient overlay on the bottom and left, and a large title.
Channels should be displayed in horizontally scrolling rails (`overflow-x-auto` with hidden scrollbar), categorized by row (Movies, Sports, Music, Hindi, German).
Implement a generic 16:9 Card component for channels. On hover, it should scale up slightly (1.05x).
Use HLS.js for the live video player inside a full-screen modal.
When a stream URL is broken, the backend probes it and the frontend should hide it. Show skeleton loaders while data is fetching.
Do NOT use pure 'transparent' for elements that have content scrolling under them; use solid #141414.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, links, toggles).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Never use generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects carefully; for this Netflix clone, prefer solid dark backgrounds or gradient fades to black over heavy blurring.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific properties.
Do not add text-align: center to the main App container.
Always use modern button styles. The 'Play' button should be white with black text, bold, with a slight scale on hover.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active states).
Prioritize optical alignment over strict geometric alignment.
